intro: Ceratoschoenus macrostachys, also known as African wormwood, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in African folk medicine for its various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Ceratoschoenus macrostachys include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
